subcodes.first_line: O my God! Verily, I beseech Thee and supplicate before Thy Presence, to forgive and overlook my sins and transgressions
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual transformation, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
